text: What if we could grow human organs on tiny chips? Organs on chips mimic human organs, allowing scientists to study diseases and test drugs. Imagine testing new medicines without risking real patients' lives. Research shows these chips can predict human responses better than animal models. But there’s uncertainty. Not all organs can be replicated accurately yet. Why? Advancements in materials and technology could change that, opening doors to personalized medicine. Curious about more science breakthroughs? Follow for more insights!
